_schema: PMS-R8 GPU/quant/shape profile descriptor schema for <model>_<quant>_<gpu>.json
purpose: Make the search agnostic: a future win is found by PROFILE (model dims + quant mix + GPU descriptor + ceiling + attribution), not by Qwen3/gfx1100 assumptions or hand-edited flags. The existing Qwen3-8B/gfx1100 routes REGENERATE from this descriptor (role shapes are derived from model dims, not copied); a new quant/model/GPU starts from census + ceiling + attribution.

quant_mix.doc: map quant -> list of roles carrying that quant in the GGUF/checkpoint (a role may appear under >1 quant in a *_K_M mix)

authority_contexts: list[int] -- the ctx set the authority gates measure (decode W==D / whole-prefill)

threshold_policy.doc: tiered_residual: candidate-vs-baseline % deltas classified into tiers
threshold_policy.note: tiered_residual; promotion thresholds are profile data consumed by BoltBeam evaluation/policy.

role_shape_derivation.doc: role (M/N/K) MUST be derivable from model dims so a route is regenerated, not hand-edited

prefill._note: same N/K as decode with M = prefill ubatch (512)

regenerates_routes: list[route_id] from the route manifest whose shape_guards must match the derived role shapes
